response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong engineering leadership, distributed systems expertise, and hands-on experience with event-driven architectures, but lacks direct experience with fintech infrastructure, regulated environments, or multi-agent AI systems in production. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and real-time systems (Dunnhumby) is promising, though not in the fintech domain. The resume highlights general senior engineering roles rather than executive-level strategic leadership.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise with event-driven and real-time systems (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Proven engineering leadership in scaling teams and processes (Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent frameworks and tooling (re:cinq, MCP code generators)
concerns: No direct fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance)
Limited evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments
Lacks regulatory/compliance experience in financial or high-stakes domains
